sources.name: NHS England
sources.dataset: Consultant-Led Referral to Treatment Waiting Times

metadata.methodology: Waiting list data from NHS England RTT incomplete pathway returns for ophthalmology (specialty code 130). Patients waiting 18+ weeks derived from RTT incomplete pathway data. Preventable sight loss estimate from Royal College of Ophthalmologists review of follow-up appointment delays.
knownIssues: RTT data captures referral-to-treatment pathways but does not separately record follow-up appointment waits, which are the primary patient safety concern in ophthalmology
Preventable sight loss figure is an estimate from clinical audit rather than administrative data
Pandemic-related suspension of routine appointments (2020-2021) creates a structural break in the time series
